name: First Mission Launch Offer
headline: First mission free. No ghost, no catch.
subtext: Recruiters guarantee a response in 24, 48, or 72 hours — or your application bumps to the top of the queue.

name: LLM Grounding Bootcamp Push
headline: Close the LLM Grounding gap → unlock 3 new missions.
subtext: ₹4,999. 3 weeks. One live design review with Sensei Vikram.

name: Recruiter Beta Pilot
headline: Are you a recruiter? Post 3 jobs for free during beta.
subtext: Pre-screened, pre-assessed, SLA-bound applicants. No more 800-resume piles.
